metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2310
metadata.comment:
Rationale: PTPRT was enriched in postsynaptic density fractions.
PTPRT co-localized to neuronal synapses stained with synaptophysin and PSD-95.
PTPRT co-localized to excitatory synapses with PSD-95 and vGLUT or to inhibitory synapses with gephyrin and vGAT.. Experimental description: Figure legend
Figure 1E. Distribution pattern of PTPRT in biochemical rat brain fractions.

Materials and methods
Cell culture and transfection
Primary hippocampal neuronal cultures were as described earlier (Lee et al, 2003)
Neuron Culture, Transfection, and Immunostaining-Primary hippocampal neuronal cultures were prepared from rat embryonic brain (embryonic day 18)
